subcodes.first_line: O faithful friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your blessed letters have come before me through the honored pilgrim, Mírzá Sulaymán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران باوفای عبدالبهاء نامهای مبارک شما بواسطه جناب زائر میرزا سلیمان بنظر
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @unity; oneness of humanity
